variants.title: Donaldson P766490 Hydraulic Housing
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P766490 Hydraulic Housing provides a durable and reliable enclosure for hydraulic filters, ensuring secure placement and optimal fluid flow within hydraulic systems. Its precision-engineered design supports efficient filtration and helps maintain system cleanliness. Constructed from high-strength materials, this hydraulic housing offers excellent resistance to pressure and wear. It is compatible with various filter types and is designed for easy maintenance and filter replacement.
specifications: Style: Hydraulic Housing, Outer Diameter: 169.0 mm, Length: 269.0 mm, Thread: 1 1/2 NPT, Bypass Pressure: 0.3 BAR bar, Bypass Pressure Bypass pressure relieve build-up of pressure within the system and allows medium to bypass the element when pressure increases and reaches a sufficient level.: 0.3 BAR
